mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, nickname, phone, email, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM auth_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_user ( username, password_hash, nickname, phone, email, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, nickname, phone, email, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM auth_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, nickname, phone, email, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM auth_user WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
